creator: crazyalexnt@inbox.ru
text:
I set:
mixer vol 100
mixer pcm 100

I start XMMS or Amarok and install it in volume - 100.
Slishitsya hiss, crackle and distortion playback.
If the lower vol and pcm to 70 - then everything is normal.

This happens on any speakers or headphones, as with the amplifier and without it.
